prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名约第83–84名（2025–2026年），属中上水平理工类院校；近年无明显负面舆情事件；抖音学校热度未进入总排名前100，短视频曝光度一般，报考关注度相对平稳；电气工程学科评估A（全国前列），动力工程及工程热物理A-；电气类、能源动力类等核心工科专业实力突出，对高分考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化2024年专业热度评为"高热推荐"，能源动力类评为"推荐"，相关工科专业社会认可度高；广西2026年物理类考生约26.66万人（按近年68%占比估算），较2025年增加约2.35%，竞争略有加剧；省控线方面，2025年物理类本科批370分、特殊类型495分，与2024年基本持平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移后的回调压力、招生计划持平、考生小幅增加及电气类专业高热吸引等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年基准17582名基础上略有前移（竞争略缓解），预测最低位次约17382名，区间16882–17882名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 13735 → 7794 → 14125 → 13622 → 17582. In 2025, it shifted back by about 3960 places compared to 2024, showing significant fluctuation. The 2025 baseline is approximately 17582. From 2021 to 2023, the science enrollment plan was 101 students; from 2024 to 2025, the Physics Category plan was 109 students; in 2026, the plan remains 109 students, unchanged from 2025, with no dilution effect from expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 83–84 in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings (2025–2026), placing it in the upper-middle tier of science and engineering institutions. No significant negative public opinion incidents in recent years. Its Douyin school popularity did not enter the top 100 overall rankings, with moderate short video exposure and relatively stable application attention. The Electrical Engineering discipline is rated A (top in the country), and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics is rated A-. Core engineering majors such as Electrical and Energy and Power are highly prominent, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, Electrical Engineering and Its Automation was rated as 'highly recommended', and Energy and Power was rated as 'recommended', with related engineering majors enjoying high social recognition. In 2026, Guangxi's Physics Category examinees are approximately 266,600 (estimated based on about 68% of total in recent years), an increase of about 2.35% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition. Regarding provincial control lines, in 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch was 370 points, and the special type was 495 points, essentially unchanged from 2024.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound pressure after the significant ranking drop in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan, a slight increase in examinees, and the high popularity of Electrical Engineering majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly improve (competition slightly eases) from the 2025 baseline of 17582. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 17382, with a range of 16882–17882.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 16882–17882, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical, Computer) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 16882), you can prioritize aiming for A-level discipline majors such as Electrical Engineering and Its Automation.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 3136 → 3207 → 2774 → 3570 → 3802, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1028 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 3802; from 2021 to 2023, the liberal arts plan was 13 students, from 2024 to 2025 the history category plan was 12 students, and the 2026 plan is 12 students, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 83–84 in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, a mid-to-upper level science and engineering institution, with liberal arts majors not being its core strength; no significant negative public opinion incidents in recent years; Douyin popularity not in the top 100 overall rankings, with stable application attention; the university's liberal arts majors have no directly corresponding A-class disciplines, and the overall academic strength of liberal arts is relatively weak compared to engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the law major is rated as 'recommended', but North China Electric Power University (Baoding) only offers 4 liberal arts majors (Law, Administrative Management, Social Work, Foreign Languages and Literature), with a narrow selection; Guangxi's 2026 history category examinees are about 125,400 (estimated based on approximately 32% proportion in recent years), an increase of about 5.3% compared to 2025, intensifying competition; regarding provincial control lines, the 2025 history category undergraduate batch is 402 points, special type is 518 points, basically unchanged from 2024.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, unchanged enrollment plans, a significant increase in history category examinees in the province, and limited liberal arts major options, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the history category in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 3802, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 3852, and a range of 3352–4352.
